song.title: O Blessed Savior
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O blessed Savior, is Thy love So great, so full, so free? Behold, I give my love, my heart, My life, my all to Thee.
[V2] 2) I love Thee for the glorious worth Which in Thyself I see; I love Thee for that shameful cross, Thou hast endured for me.
[V3] 3) No man of greater love can boast Than for his friend to die; Thou for Thine enemies wast slain! What love with Thine can vie?
[V4] 4) Though in the very form of God, With heav’nly glory crowned, Thou wouldst partake of human flesh, Beset with troubles round.
[V5] 5) Thou wouldst like wretched man be made In everything but sin, That we as like Thee might become As we unlike had been:
[V6] 6) Like Thee in faith, in meekness, love, In every beauteous grace, From glory into glory changed, Till we behold Thy face.
[V7] 7) O Lord, I'll treasure in my soul The mem’ry of Thy love; And Thy dear name shall still to me A grateful odor prove.
song.author: Joseph Stennett
